title: 2 reasons why Microsoft belongs in your portfolio: D.A. Davidson's Gil Luria
summary: D.A. Davidson's Gil Luria joins Yahoo Finance's Josh Lipton to explain why Microsoft (MSFT) is a top AI stock, arguing that its multi-year access to OpenAI’s technology and the rise of open-source models make owning a proprietary frontier model unnecessary.

title: Google, Amazon, Meta, & Microsoft will spend 'unprecedented' $1T on AI capex in 2027: Analyst
summary: Evercore ISI senior managing director and head of internet research, Mark Mahaney, discusses Alphabet's (GOOG, GOOGL) recent earnings results and his outlook for AI capex spending.

title: Why Americans Are Fighting the AI Data Center Boom
summary: Dozens of data center developers and utilities pledged with President Donald Trump that AI data centers won’t raise consumer electricity bills. The opposition won’t back down.

title: When AI CapEx Eats Cash: Is Alphabet’s Huge Bet Building a Moat or Sinking Margins?
summary: Alphabet  reported blowout earnings results late Wednesday, but the stock is dropping after the search giant again raised its forecast for capital expenditures.  The Google-parent reported second-quarter adjusted earnings of $9.11 per share, well ahead of Wall Street’s consensus estimate for earnings of $2.88 per share, according to FactSet.  Alphabet said the results included $6.26 a share in gains on the fair value of its equity securities.

title: Why Nvidia Stock Isn’t Rallying as It Should After Alphabet Earnings
summary: The Google parent’s results have provided fuel for a rally in chip stocks, but Nvidia has been left behind.

summary: Amazon Slides Ahead of Earnings on China Probe and AI Cost Concerns

title: Amazon (AMZN) Faces Senate Probe As FTC Settlement Puts Prime Practices In Focus
summary: US lawmakers have opened a Senate investigation into Amazon's marketplace over alleged Chinese influence on the platform. Amazon has agreed to a US$2.5b settlement with the FTC related to allegations of unauthorized Prime enrollments. These parallel actions focus on the company’s governance, customer consent practices, and oversight of third-party sellers. Amazon.com, NasdaqGS:AMZN, sits at the center of global e-commerce and cloud services, connecting millions of buyers with third-party...

title: Big Tech's Off-Balance-Sheet AI Debt Reportedly Tops $1.65 Trillion: Ed Zitron Says It 'Should Be a Shareholder Riot'
summary: Big Tech is reportedly sitting on $1.65 trillion in debt that investors can’t see on any balance sheet, and prominent tech critic Ed Zitron calls it “a corporate scandal.” The figure comes from a Nikkei Asia study of Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META), Oracle (NYSE:ORCL), Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL), Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) and Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN). title: This Dog Sniffs Out A Buy Point While Monitoring AI Behavior With AWS, Azure, Google
summary: Boosted by big AI demand and partnership with AWS, Microsoft Azure and Google, Datadog is tracking the scent of a breakout.
